_comment: Macro-Terrain: Blood Ancestor Congealed Sea. Per scale directive: this terrain IS a being. Player shouldn't initially realize they're standing on bone. Divine Sense -> Perception changes -> 'You realize this mountain range... is one finger.' Prime Directive: the being's corpse is objectively terrain; perception tier determines what the player sees.
name: Blood Ancestor Congealed Sea
scale: 200 li across — the congealed body of an ancient beast.
canonical_event: Wang Lin killed the Blood Ancestor here; its corpse-sea remains.

perception_tiered_appearance.mortal: A sea of congealed blood 200 li across, perpetually liquid, no waves.
perception_tiered_appearance.qi_condensation: The sea radiates blood-essence; the air is thick with blood-qi.
perception_tiered_appearance.foundation_establishment: The sea is congealed blood; the blood is alive, slowly regenerating.
perception_tiered_appearance.core_formation: This is the Blood Ancestor's corpse-sea; the blood is its congealed body.
perception_tiered_appearance.nascent_soul: The Blood Ancestor's will still lingers in the blood; cultivating here is dangerous.
perception_tiered_appearance.spirit_severing: The Blood Ancestor can reform from this sea; the sea is its anchor.

perception_mechanic.trigger: When player's perception tier rises, the appearance re-rolls automatically.
perception_mechanic.no_locked_upgrades: A mortal who later reaches Core Formation will see the truth; the terrain does not change, only understanding does.
perception_mechanic.canon_fidelity: This is exactly how Wang Lin perceived Ancient God Tu Si's remains — first as terrain, then as god-bone, then as god-memory.
